summary: Tested all 11 specified features: mobile horizontal scroll fixes, Alerts/Meeting Prep tab layouts, Edit Student modal, Bulk Archive, and backend endpoints. All backend tests pass. All UI features working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Edit Student modal: modal inputs are not inside a semantic dialog/role=dialog container - this causes playwright to find 41 inputs (all checkboxes + modal fields) when querying without scoping. Recommend wrapping modal content with role='dialog' or a specific data-testid for easier automated testing.
PUT /students/{student_id} update endpoint: if student not found, returns the result of find_one which could be None (no 404 raised). Consider adding a 404 if student not found.
seed_data_creation: Created test students stu_test_edit_001 and stu_archive_test_0/1 (archived during testing)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features from this iteration are working: mobile scroll fix, Alerts Tier Changes layout, Meeting Prep Tier Changes layout, Edit Student modal with pre-filled data, Bulk Archive with floating bar. Backend PUT /students/bulk-archive and PUT /students/{student_id} both work. Session token: test_session_welltrack_1773836766689 (valid 7 days from 2026-03-18).
